sql_query.query: SELECT c.id, c.name, c.description, c.contribution_amount, c.currency, c.frequency, c.seats, c.pot_balance, c.current_cycle, c.status, c.invite_code, m.payout_position, m.has_been_paid::int AS has_been_paid, m.role FROM circles c JOIN memberships m ON m.circle_id = c.id WHERE m.user_id = $1 AND c.deleted_at IS NULL ORDER BY c.updated_at DESC
